name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: San Antonio, TX — ACE Cash Express at 534 N New Braunfels Ave offers payday loans, title loans, and quick cash advances.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express at 534 N New Braunfels Ave in San Antonio, TX is a standalone cash lending storefront on New Braunfels Avenue. The store serves the San Antonio community with payday loans and title lending services. Hours: Monday–Friday 9AM–7PM, Saturday 9AM–6PM, closed Sundays.

This San Antonio location offers payday advances, title loans, and cash loans on personal property. Call +1 210-225-5032 to ask about current rates, required documentation, or same-day loan availability. Staff can answer eligibility questions and assist with applications.

If you need quick cash in San Antonio, TX before payday or for unexpected expenses, bring a valid ID and proof of income. Fast approval is common at this location—stop by to learn more about qualifying amounts.
address: 534 N New Braunfels Ave, San Antonio, TX 78202

company_info.headquarters: 534 N New Braunfels Ave, San Antonio, TX 78202

pros: Multiple product offerings including installment loans, title loans, and check cashing reduces need to visit multiple providers
Online loan application option available alongside physical store network
Same-day or next-day funding capability for emergency cash needs
Established multi-state presence with numerous physical locations for in-person service
Bill payment and money transfer services available in-store
Tax services offered at select locations
Customer service available via phone and email with dedicated online loan support line
cons: State-by-state service and product availability varies significantly with some loan types unavailable in specific states
No specific APR, fee, or loan term information accessible from available website content
Physical locations may have limited hours; Denver location URL returned 404 errors preventing verification of current operations
Limited online presence and documentation; website navigation issues suggest potential service discontinuation or relocation
No clear information about eligibility requirements, credit score impact, or renewal/rollover policies
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash who have vehicle title as collateral
Underbanked individuals without access to traditional bank credit
Consumers needing check cashing or bill payment services beyond emergency loans
Workers seeking tax preparation services through a single provider
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers with immediate cash needs who have collateral (vehicle title) or need alternative financial services like check cashing and money transfers. The primary caveat is that service availability, loan products, and terms vary significantly by state, and the website's technical issues (404 errors on location pages) make it difficult to verify current operational status or access specific pricing and terms before visiting a physical location or calling customer service.
